models.description: LGBM — raw return rank target, 7y dataset, walk-forward CV. Mean WFCV IC 0.146, test IC 0.314, hit rate 61.2%. Champion.
LGBM — quality-adjusted composite rank target, 7y dataset, walk-forward CV. Mean WFCV IC 0.150, test IC 0.240, hit rate 58.2%. Candidate.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 10y dataset. IC 0.180. Retired.
LGBM — composite target, 10y dataset. IC 0.171. Retired.
LSTM h256-L2 — clip target, walk-forward CV (6 folds, EMA 180d). Mean WFCV IC-63d 0.197, IC-21d 0.147. Candidate.
Set Transformer — sector-relative rank target, cross-stock attention, d_model=128. Test IC 0.141. Retired pending CPU optimization.
